component.name: Portal for Teams
component.summary: Unofficial Microsoft Teams client for Linux

description.p: Experience seamless integration with the Microsoft Teams Web App in a standalone Electron application.
This application is an unofficial client for Microsoft Teams.

ul.li: Improve Quick Chat keyboard shortcut messaging and menu integration - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2188)
fix: restore CSS selectors and add diagnostic logging for MQTT status - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2197)
Fix screen sharing detection for non-English locales - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2210)
Improve CI workflow triggers and PR artifact detection - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2212)
Upgrade Issue Triage Bot to use Gemini 2.5 Flash model - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2213)
Replace node-sound with Web Audio API for notifications - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2214)
fix: screen sharing regression on Wayland/XWayland - by @bkohler (#2219)
chore(deps): bump @easyops-cn/docusaurus-search-local from 0.24.1 to 0.55.0 in /docs-site in the minor-and-patch group (#2224)
Add cross-distro testing environment for Teams for Linux - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2226)
docs: update roadmap for v2.7.9 planning - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2227)
Add XWayland optimizations configuration option - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2229)
Clarify Microsoft Teams web app references in issue triage - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2232)
Simplify Gemini API JSON parsing with responseMimeType - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2233)
Refactor artifact commenting to use workflow_run event - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2237)
chore(deps-dev): bump minimatch from 3.1.2 to 3.1.5 (#2240)
chore(deps): bump minimatch from 10.2.2 to 10.2.4 in /docs-site (#2241)
Improve Intune authentication user validation logic - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2242)
docs: close screen lock media privacy — no user interest - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2189)
Add Phase 3: Duplicate detection for issue triage bot - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2192)
fix: add error handler to incoming call command spawn - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2194)
Add dependency overrides to resolve security vulnerabilities - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2200)
docs: update roadmap after v2.7.7 release - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2201)
chore: generate initial issue index for duplicate detection - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2202)
Improve network error handling and recovery - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2206)
ci: auto-remove 'awaiting user feedback' label on issue comment - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2208)
docs: update roadmap for v2.7.7 planning - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2187)
fix: camera crash on XWayland by skipping fake media UI flag (#2169) - by @GrzegorzKozub (#2190)
chore: remove unused agentic files and audit research docs - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2191)
ci: raise audit level to critical for minimatch advisory - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2196)
Replace appimagetool post-processing with electron-updater research - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2158)
feat: in-app auto-update for AppImage via electron-updater - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2159)
GitHub Issue Bot Phase 2: AI-powered solution suggestions - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2160)
fix: only register quick chat shortcut when enabled and explicitly configured - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2161)
feat: automate snap release to candidate channel - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2162)
docs: add Electron 40 migration research document - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2163)
Handle edge/prerelease version suffixes in release info generation - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2164)
docs: add code quality and hardening research - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2165)
docs: update plan docs with code quality hardening research and fix sidebar gaps - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2166)
fix: security hardening phase 1 - PII logging, resilience, input handling - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2167)
Refactor CSP setup to static method and centralize header handling - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2171)
ci: add lint, audit, and Dependabot to CI/CD pipeline - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2172)
Phase 3: Workflow permissions and CODEOWNERS for supply chain security - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2183)
Improve code quality: remove PII from logs, fix style issues, clean up ESLint - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2148)
chore(deps): bump the npm_and_yarn group across 2 directories with 1 update (#2149)
Fix version references in Wayland troubleshooting documentation - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2150)
Update roadmap for v2.7.4 release and v2.7.5 planning - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2153)
Make Quick Chat feature opt-in via configuration - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2155)
feat: handle Microsoft Cloud App Security (MCAS) domain suffix in hostname validation - by @tvanderpool (#2101)
feat: Implement Quick Chat Access with People API and inline messaging (#2109) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2119)
Add GitHub Issue Bot research and investigation document - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2126)
docs: Update roadmap for v2.7.4 release plan, archive logout indicator - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2133)
chore(deps): bump webpack from 5.101.3 to 5.105.0 in /docs-site in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#2134)
Add GitHub Issue Triage Bot Phase 1 (Information Request) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2135)
Force X11 ozone platform by default on Linux - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2139)
docs: Migrate community chat links from Gitter to Matrix space (#2113) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2141)
docs: add uninstall guide with instructions for all installation methods (#2048) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2142)
Update development roadmap for v2.7.4 release - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2145)
feat: add camera resolution and aspect ratio browser tools - by @Brad-Fullwood (#2060)
Replace clipboard monitoring with join meeting dialog - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2082)
Fix AppImage extraction to work without execute permissions - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2102)
Upgrade Playwright to v1.58.1 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2103)
Convert window icon to nativeImage for proper Linux/KDE display - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2104)
Update roadmap for v2.7.3 with current priorities and status - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2105)
Add chat API validation spikes for chat modal feasibility testing - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2111)
docs: Add PII log removal research and implementation plan - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2114)
feat: Add PII log sanitizer utility (Phase 1) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2116)
Upgrade dependencies: electron, electron-builder, and globals - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2117)
feat: Integrate PII sanitizer with electron-log (Phase 2-5) (#2118)
docs: Update documentation for deprecated config options (#2120) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2122)
Fix Teams icon registration by expanding CSP CDN domain allowlist - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2123)
docs: Upgrade electron-store to 11.0.2 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2124)
Add last updated timestamp to release notes comment - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2125)
Add enhanced release notes generation for release workflow - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2128)
fix(screenSharing): prevent SIGILL crash by using static thumbnails - by @bluvulture (#2089), @IsmaelMartinez (#2068)
Fix Intune SSO for Microsoft Identity Broker > 2.0.1 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2069)
Fix tray icon rendering on Linux by always using nativeImage - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2096)
Upgrade yargs to v18 and update dependencies - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2097)
Add AppImage update info to Linux builds for third-party managers - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2067)
Fix username matching for intune auth to not be case-sensitive - by @vizius-jps (#2076)
Add development roadmap and reorganize research documentation - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2079)
fix(ci): use unsquashfs for cross-architecture ARM AppImage extraction - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2080)
docs: Add GNOME Shell search provider investigation research - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2081)
Remove references to mqtt-commands-implementation research doc - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2083)
chore(deps): bump tar from 6.2.1 to 7.5.7 in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#2084)
Fix: update reference to core services due to upstream change (#2077) - by @bastidest (#2085)
Implement Calendar Data Export Feature - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2006)
chore: upgrade Electron from 37.9.0 to 39.2.6 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2020)
docs: fix documentation inconsistencies across repository - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2030)
fix: MQTT status stuck on do_not_disturb - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2032)
chore(deps): bump the npm_and_yarn group across 2 directories with 1 update (#2034)
chore(deps): bump qs from 6.13.0 to 6.14.1 in /docs-site in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#2035)
Fix Electron 39 snap permissions issue - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2040)
Update dependencies for Electron 39 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2045)
Update default teams link - by @XCroatoanX (#2046)
ci: restore armv7l snap build - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2050)
Fix SonarQube security issue in changelog workflow - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2051)
Fix changelog generation for external repositories - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2052)
docs: update research documentation status and remove outdated files - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2053)
feat: add automated release preparation workflow - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2056)
chore(deps): bump the npm_and_yarn group across 2 directories with 1 update (#2061)
Investigate issue 1984 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1989)
Investigate and resolve GitHub issue 1987 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1990)
Start config research implementation phase one - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2005)
Implement MQTT Extended Status Phase 1a - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2007)
Fix changelog generation triggering on every change - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2008)
Make top bar elements clickable in frameless mode - by @KrissN (#2009)
chore(deps): bump mdast-util-to-hast from 13.2.0 to 13.2.1 in /docs-site in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#2012)
[Research]: Disable camera and microphone when screen is locked (#2015) - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2018)
Investigate Open Login Dialog in the browser #2017 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2019)
chore: cleanup obsolete tasks folder and consolidate docs - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2022)
[Research]: Review and improve project configuration options - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1937)
Display research docs in side panel - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1993)
Implement issue 1991 with simple approach - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1994)
chore(deps): bump node-forge from 1.3.1 to 1.3.2 in /docs-site in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#1996)
Change raise-hand command to toggle-hand-raise - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1997)
Remove [skip ci] from changelog generator to enable PR merging - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1998)
Update metadata for com.github.IsmaelMartinez.teams_for_linux - by @razzeee (#1999)
Add menu toggle for badge count notification setting - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2000)
Add calendar export research for issue #1995 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#2001)
[Research]: Explore solutions MQTT Publish camera, microphone and in-call state - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1941)
[Research]: Evaluate adding command line arguments, bundle an mqtt server and supporting commands/actions in our mqtt implementation - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1956)
[Research]: Graph API integration - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1958)
Add custom notification system to docs - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1981)
Update notification system research documentation - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1982)
Fix changelog push to run all build jobs - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1983)
Move useSystemPicker investigation to ADR - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1985)
Implement MQTT Commands feature - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1986)
Fix Docusaurus build and deployment in main - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1988)
[Research]: Build notification modal component - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1935)
[Research]: Consolidate project documentation and ADRs - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1957)
Refactor index.js partitions and idle state of #1960 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1968)
[Docs] Update Incremental Refactoring Plan - Phase 1 Complete & Phase 2 Reassessment - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1970)
Continue incremental refactoring implementation - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1971)
documentation improvements - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1974)
Review and reduce duplication in development docs - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1975)
Simplify docs homepage and quick reference - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1976)
Implement notifications modal MVP - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1979)
Add AI-powered changelog system to decouple merging from releasing - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1951)
[Refactor]: Extract notification functions from app/index.js - part of #1960 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1962)
Continue refactoring epic work of #1960 - by @IsmaelMartinez (#1966)
chore(deps): bump js-yaml from 3.14.1 to 3.14.2 in /docs-site in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#1967)
Update: Electron 37.10.0 and electron-builder 26.2.0 for latest bug fixes and improvements
Refactor: Extract command line switch management into dedicated startup module - reduces app/index.js by 96 lines (12.8%) with improved code organization (Week 1 of incremental refactoring plan)
Feature: Enable PR artifact downloads - pre-built binaries now automatically uploaded to pull requests for easier testing without building from source (#1952)

Documentation: Consolidate AI agent instruction files - eliminate 28% content duplication by establishing single source of truth for markdown standards and using reference-based approach across CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, and workflow instruction files
Update: Electron upgraded to 37.9.0, ESLint to 9.39.1, and globals to 16.5.0 for latest bug fixes and improvements
Refactor: Remove excessive comments from feature flag handling functions for improved code clarity

Feature: Add automated PR binary artifact uploads for all platforms - contributors and testers can now download pre-built packages directly from GitHub Actions to test PR changes without building from source (closes #1940)
Documentation: Streamline CONTRIBUTING.md to be a quick reference guide with links to comprehensive Docusaurus documentation

Research: Complete architecture modernization analysis - comprehensive research revealing that the codebase is well-structured with 49% of index.js extractable through low-risk incremental refactoring instead of large-scale architectural overhaul (supersedes #1799 DDD+Plugin approach)
Feature: Add MQTT integration for Teams status publishing - implemented by @Donnyp751 (closes #1791)

Fix: Revert notification behavior to v2.2.1 pattern to fix "notifications only work once" issue - v2.6.8 async refactoring broke notification return value, preventing Teams from managing notification lifecycle (issue #1921)
Feature: Add GPU info debug window accessible from Debug menu - displays chrome://gpu information for diagnosing graphics and hardware acceleration issues
Feature: Add configurable global keyboard shortcuts that work system-wide - allows Teams shortcuts to work even when app is not focused (opt-in, disabled by default)
Fix: Resolve SonarQube code quality issues
Feature: Expand regex for Teams URLs to include most formats of MS Teams URLs
Feature: Support short form Teams URLs (e.g., /meet/) with simplified single regex configuration
Feature: Add back/forward navigation buttons to Teams UI - browser-style navigation controls positioned in titlebar
Fix: Restore notification auto-close behavior on Ubuntu by re-integrating CustomNotification wrapper that sets requireInteraction: false (issue #1888)
Feature: Respect user's disableGpu configuration on Wayland - users can now explicitly enable GPU acceleration via config file or CLI argument (issue #1890)
Feature: Add in-app documentation viewer accessible from Help menu
Fix: Restore trayIconRenderer ipcRenderer initialization that was accidentally reverted (issue #1902)
Fix: Narrow screen share detection to prevent audio being disabled in regular calls - fixes mute/unmute workaround requirement (issues #1896, #1871)
Update: Electron upgraded to 37.7.1 for latest security patches and bug fixes
CI/CD: Parallelize E2E tests with builds for ~40% faster CI/CD pipeline execution
Security: Pin all GitHub Actions to commit SHAs to prevent supply chain attacks and update actions to latest versions
Code Cleanup: Removed ~70 lines of debug/test code from reactHandler.js - removed React version detection, globalThis debug exposure, and verbose logging
Fix: Cache management now disabled by default based on user feedback - can still be manually enabled if needed (issues #1868, #1840)
Fix: Screen sharing selector X button no longer shows TypeError when canceling - graceful error handling implemented (issue #1889)
Fix: Preview window now closes automatically when meeting ends - detects when stop sharing button disappears from DOM (issue #1870)
Docs: Add Recall.ai sponsorship section to README
Fix: Prevent infinite loop on rapid network changes from Docker - resolves critical system freeze issue caused by Docker container restarts
Fix: Implement debouncing mechanism (1s delay) for network refresh operations to handle rapid network change events gracefully
Fix: Add concurrent refresh prevention flag to avoid overlapping network test operations that could saturate system resources
Fix: Proper event listener cleanup to prevent memory leaks when ConnectionManager is restarted
Enhancement: Add start:dev npm script with --no-sandbox flag for easier development testing
Fix: Revert to core22 and Electron 37.7.0 for snap compatibility - electron-builder doesn't support core24 yet (issue #8548)
Documentation: Add comprehensive MQTT integration documentation with configuration guide, troubleshooting, and home automation examples
Fix: Upgrade snap base from core22 to core24 to resolve LIBDBUS_PRIVATE_1.12.20 startup crash with Electron 38
Feature: Add automated E2E testing infrastructure using Playwright - smoke tests validate app launch and Microsoft login redirect
CI/CD: Integrate E2E tests into GitHub Actions workflow - all builds now depend on tests passing
Major: Upgrade Electron from 37.6.0 to 38.3.0 with Chromium 140, Node.js 22, improved Wayland support - macOS 12+ now required
Enhancement: Modernize screen sharing with native private fields, fix IPC listener memory leak and race conditions - improves reliability
Update: ESLint upgraded to 9.38.0 and electron-builder to 26.1.0 for latest bug fixes and improvements
Documentation: Overall review of the documentation to add missing links and re-ordering of some areas
Documentation: Upgrade Docusaurus dependencies and fix search functionality for improved documentation experience
Fix: Wayland screenshare preview window now works correctly by using desktopCapturer source ID format (screen:x:y) instead of MediaStream UUIDs
Fix: Correct snap workflow arm64 build command typo (armv64 -> arm64) that prevented arm64 snap releases
Update the release pipeline to publish arm64 snaps
Feature: Add a new tray menu entry to join a teams meeting from a copied URL in the clipboard
Attempt: Disable all audio in screen sharing to try to fix issue #1800 - might fix audio echo on Wayland/Pipewire
Update: Electron updated to 37.6.0, ESLint to 9.36.0 for latest security patches and bug fixes
Feature: Implement secure token cache storage using Electron safeStorage API - tokens are now encrypted using OS-level security (Keychain/DPAPI/kwallet) instead of plain localStorage
Enhancement: Increase default cache size limit from 300MB to 600MB to reduce frequency of automatic cache cleanup
Fix: Resolve disableAutogain initialization failure that prevented microphone auto-gain control from being disabled properly
Restore: Re-enable disableAutogain functionality that was removed in v2.3.0 - allows manual control over microphone auto-gain for professional audio setups
Fix: Restore tray icon badge count functionality that was missing since v2.3.0 - properly initialize TrayIconRenderer module in preload script
Fix: Ensure microsoft-identity-broker is started before use, allowing SSO to work more reliability
Fix: Resolve missing screen-sharing-started IPC handler that could cause screen sharing session tracking issues
Enhancement: Add comprehensive tray icon diagnostic logging with [TRAY_DIAG] tags to help troubleshoot notification timing and performance issues
Enhancement: Add detailed screen sharing echo diagnostics with audio track analysis and duplicate session detection
Enhancement: Add extensive Intune SSO diagnostic logging with troubleshooting guidance for D-Bus and Identity Broker issues
Documentation: Add comprehensive Intune SSO documentation with troubleshooting guidance for enterprise environments
Documentation: Refactor Intune integration documentation to separate developer vs user content
Documentation: Update RPM installation instructions to use modern dnf commands with proper sudo usage
Update: Electron updated to 37.4.0 and electron-builder to 26.0.20 with latest security patches
Fix: Reactions bar no longer shows an unintended set of reactions above the bar due to GPU composition on Wayland systems.
Fix: Implement token cache bridge to resolve authentication refresh issues - provides missing _tokenCache interface to Teams authentication provider
Enhancement: Add comprehensive diagnostic logging for authentication refresh issues to help diagnose persistent "Please sign in again" problems
Enhancement: Add detailed screen sharing audio duplication logging to identify echo issues and multiple session creation
Fix: Restore DOM access functionality by disabling contextIsolation and sandbox for Teams browser integration
Security: Implement comprehensive compensating controls including Content Security Policy headers and IPC channel validation
Enhancement: Add React version detection to monitor for breaking changes in React 19+ timeline
Changed from --webDebug --logConfig='{}' to ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=true teams-for-linux --logConfig='{}'
Fix: Revert audio channel disabling in screen sharing as it doesn't resolve echo issues
Fix: Attempt to address screen sharing audio echo by preventing audio channel creation during screen sharing
Update: Electron updated to 37.3.1 with latest security patches
Update: ESLint and related dependencies updated to latest versions
Major: Complete documentation platform migration to Docusaurus with modern search and mobile-first design
Fix: Cache manager now preserves authentication tokens. This might prevent 24-hour forced re-authentication cycles. Might fix #1357
Fix: macOS dock icon now displays correctly with proper 128x128 minimum size requirement and fallback resizing
Fix: preload browser scripts now correctly handle context isolation. Might fix #1789 and #1795
New: GitHub Pages documentation deployment - documentation now available online
Update: Electron upgraded to 37.3.0
Improvement: Enhanced contributor documentation with GitHub Pages workflow
Enhancement: Added comprehensive documentation links throughout project
Fix: Remove duplicate instantiation of the notifications object
New: Improved screen sharing with enhanced contextIsolation and sandbox support
Improvement: Comprehensive documentation restructuring and simplification
Cleanup: Removed obsolete configuration options (contextIsolation, sandbox, disableAutogain)
Remove the inAppUi as it is not needed at the moment
Update: Electron upgraded to 37.2.6 (may fix issue #1755)
New: Implemented control for in-app UI window visibility via configuration.
New: Enhanced screen sharing pop-out window (Closes #1538):
• Displays shared screen content.
• Ensures only a single pop-out window instance.
• Closes automatically when screen sharing stops.
Added system-wide configuration support at /etc/teams-for-linux/config.json for enterprise deployments (Closes #1773)
Enabling by default the cache management solution implemented in #1765
Internal: Added CLAUDE.md for Claude-specific instructions.
Internal: Added new task list files for project management.
Add msTeamsProtocols config option to handle v1 and v2 Teams protocol links, and adding messages
Documentation improvements
Created future prds and ai research documents for documentation-health and ui-system-strategic-analysis
Removed deb packaging details to fix #1768
Add configurable cache management to prevent daily logout issues (Issue #1756) - disabled by default, enable with config option
Add proper Debian changelog generation for package managers (Issue #1691)
Enhance build process with upstream changelog support for deb and rpm packages
Update Electron from 37.2.0 to 37.2.4 with major stability improvements:
• Fixed window close callback crashes that caused unexpected app termination (addresses Issue #1757)
• Enhanced desktop capture with reduced crashes and better screen sharing quality (addresses Issues #1762, #1743, #1715)
• Improved window management and resizing functionality (addresses Issue #1736)
• Updated Chromium to 138.0.7204.157 for security and performance improvements
• Better Linux desktop environment compatibility and PipeWire integration
Update @homebridge/dbus-native to 0.7.2 for improved ARM compatibility
Update ESLint to 9.32.0 and electron-builder to 26.0.19 for better development experience
Update Electron to 37.2.0
Update @eslint/js to 9.30.1
Update eslint to 9.30.1
Update globals to 16.3.0
Reviewed Electron 37 breaking changes: no impact on this project
electron-store not updated due to breaking changes in v9+
yargs not updated due to breaking changes in v18+
Added setting to include timestamps and usernames on copy (default)
Update electron to 36.4.0 and @homebridge/dbus-native to 0.7.1 for improved ARM compatibility and security
Adding release info generation from com.github.IsmaelMartinez.teams_for_linux.appdata.xml file
Validate the release version is ready on the build.yml github action
Updating github actions to use node 22
Added a reimplementation of the call events to revive the incoming call scripts
Added an incoming call toast just like the one from the discontinued Linux Teams App from Microsoft
Ensuring that microphone and camera entitlements are properly requested on OSX
Adding --videoMenu option to enable a menu section which contains options to manipulate video elements (enable video controls, enter picture-in-picture mode)
Update electron to 35.4.0
Fixing 1681 by only applying the tray icon size changes if in macos
Update electron to 35.2.2
Removing using the appTitle to setup the app name introduced in the previous version, as that breaks the icon in linux systems
Update electron to 35.2.1
New: dynamically set Docker icon for macOS
Updating electron to 35.2.0
Remove disableMeetingNotifications as it is not possible anymore
Removing the incomingCallCommand and incomingCallCommandArgs as they are not working anymore
Removing ntlmV2enabled as it is not documented anymore in Chromium and it should be the default value
Removing deprecated `clearStorage` in favor of `clearStorageData`
Removing deprecated `customUserDir` in favor of `--user-data-dir`
Changing the default value of `onNewWindowOpenMeetupJoinUrlInApp` to `true`
Fix documentation reference for running multiple instances
Minor electron version bump to 35.1.5
Improving documentation by adding font square characters info fix in the KNOWN_ISSUES section
Adding information on how to run multiple instances in the app
Reshaping the config README file for easier reading
Fix 1379 allow option for links in offline meetings to open in the app. The config option called onNewWindowOpenMeetupJoinUrlInApp and defaults to false
Fix 1644 Status is set to away unless mouse moves over Teams for Linux window
Fix user-data-dir references in the README
Fix unable to join some meeting links
Fix undefined Error when quitting with Quit (Clear Storage)
Fix the appdata file typo in version 1.14.2, and fixing warnings for appstream-screenshot-missing-caption
Some formatting and minor improvements to the README/HISTORY/KNWON_ISSUES md files
Fix the appdata file
Fix: Fix the electron-builder configuration to fix the desktop file been broken
Update dependencies including electron to version 35.1.4
Remove deprecated config enableBackgroundCallsAuthentication that was never announced but people didn't complain about
optInTeamsV2 and customBGServiceIgnoreMSDefaults config options are no longer available as they where teams-v1 specific
Cleaning up teams-v1 logic in the app
Set default url to be https://teams.microsoft.com/v2 instead of https://teams.microsoft.com
Remove activityHub eventHandlers for the teams-v1 events
Deprecate clearStorage in favour of clearStorageData
Reformat code using prettier
Remove permissionCheckHandler and cookie printing
Remove deprecated appLogLevels. Use logConfig instead
Update electron to 35.1.2
Update electron-builder to 26.0.12
BREAKING CHANGE: deprecating customUserDir as eletron doesn't support camelCase on those anymore. Use ELECTRON_USER_DATA_PATH env variable instead
Update the deep link regex to allow /l/chat deep links in addition to meetings and channels
Increase dependency versions to include fix from electron for #1487
Checking if the settings file exists when trying to restore it to fix #1547
Add screen-wake-lock, persistent-storage and geolocation to the allowed permission, and add sharepoint.com and outlook.office.com to the allowed domains
Update electron to 34.4.5 and other small library updates to fix issue 1590
Fixing permissions to allow copy link that stopped working when adding the permissionHandlersConfig (issue 1585)
Update electron to 34.3.0 and other small library updates
Adding permissionCheckHandler config option to verify if 3rd party cookies are affecting token refreshing
Removing enableBackgroundCallsAuthentication config option as it was broken, and probabaly not doing anything for us
Update electron to 33.4.1
Adding enableBackgroundCallsAuthentication config option to validate if this keeps the user authenticated for longer
Removing the writeUrlBlockLog function that use to log those requests into a file for debugging
Handling of UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'webContents') at PowerMonitor.refresh (.../app/connectionManager/index.js:31:34)
Checking the tray status before trying to update the badge count
Fixing frame option by applying the correct type (boolean instead of string)
Updating electron to 33.3.1 and eslint to 9.18.0
Fix wrong console.warning error to console.warn
Update electron version to 33.3.0
Change Fetched custom background remote configuration... error to warning
Update electron version to 33.2.1
Fix selection of InTune user when explicitly pinning it via `ssoInTuneAuthUser`
Improving security on the loginForm by removing the need of contentIsolation
Removing the already deprecated `onlineCheckMethod` option from the config options
Updating the HISTORY section to be more inline with the current stated of affairs
Improving security on the streamSelector to work without the need of contentIsolation
Move from BaseView (deprecated), to WebContentsView in the streamSelector
Updating vsconfig to allow for electron and chrome debugging
Change the default value of frame to true
Package updates including moving to electron 33.2.0
Allow frameless window by using the config 'frame' option
Remove unused electron remote package
Update electron to 33.0.2
Remove electron-is-dev and just use the app.isPackaged
Other small library updates
Modifying the menu to include zoom, and help sections
Fix some sonarcloud detected issues
Add debug log for cookie change for authtoken and domain teams.microsoft.com
Updated electron to 32.2.0
Updated electron-builder 25.1.8
Automated network check and deprecating `onlineCheckMethod`
Changing default logger to console.info and no file, instead of using the electron-log defaults
Increase electron version to 32.1.2 and electron build to 25.0.5
Moving the notification number to be in the bottom right hand side of the icon
Add support to simulate Windows-based Chromium Browser
Added support for OpenSUSE to rpm distribution
Changing the T4L icons to comply with Flathub policies
refine disabling gpu and fix render-process-gone logging
Fix Incomplete regular expression for hostnames for github scanning in ms teams url
Printing the render-process-gone reason to help analyse #1369
Update the logger to be `electron-log` by default, and update the documentation, as the config options don't seem to overwrite the logger
Adding a new conditional for msteams meeting invites to handle the differences between v1 and v2
Revert the default url to be teams v1, not v2.
Update the logger to be `console` by default, as the documentation indicates
Update electron from 30.2.0 to 30.4.0
Update electron from eslint and global libraries
Add --class flag to allow setting the WM_CLASS property to a custom value
Apply disableHardwareAcceleration on disableGpu flag
Moving from lucid-log to electron-log
Adding --logConfig option to allow choosing between console, electron-log or Falsy (no logs in console)
Adding --help option to show the config options
Deprecating --appLogLevels in favor of --logConfig
Adding deprecated warning popup if deprecated options found to be in use
Refactoring the customBackground service and including an example
Updating electron to 30.2.0, and other small dependency updates
Fix awayOnSystemIdle behaviour when locking the screen: now it shows status as "Available" when locking the screen with awayOnSystemIdle = false
Increase electron version to 30.1.2
Fix handleOnCallConnected not calling disable screen lock
Adding contextIsolation and sandbox config options. These will break some functionality but are added as a WIP to help assessing what it would break
Add watchConfigFile option to restart the app if the configuration changes
Modify configError message to have an icon and adding the ability to provide warning dialogs (for config deprecations)
Changing app description to be more flathub compliat
Refactoring around inTune and the config file handling
Refactoring events to all be kebab-case instead of a mix of kebab-case and camelCase
FIX broken screen sharing during calls
App renamed to Portal for Teams in flathub
Moved to sonarcloud from codacity and fixed some sonarcloud issues
Moved from deprecated v2 version of codeql to v3
Added disableGlobalShortcuts config option to disable global shortcuts
Adding a meetupJoinRegEx config option to handle meetup-join/channel regular expressions
Aligning setWindowOpenHandler and processArgs to use the meetupJoinRegEx config option
Small linting fixes for css files
General small refactoring work
FIX missing icon in alt-tab
Improve tweaks css file, to hide the "waffle" menu and align the logo
FIX broken app when dbus not present
Moved from Yarn to NPM to simplify the build process
Add support for Single Sign On using Microsoft Intune
Adding --rpm-digest=sha256 to fix RPM insatll on FIPS enabled system
Adding teams.live.com to the URLs evaluated across the app
Renaming ssoUser to ssoBasicAuthUser, and ssoPasswordCommand to ssoBasicAuthPassswordCommand.
Adding the config option trayIconEnabled that defaults to true
Adding ssoUser and ssoPasswordCommand to allow to bypass needing to add your password.
Don't show error in case of missing config file.
Show error message if configuration is invalid
Fix awayOnSystemIdle flag in Teams V2
Fix custom backgrounds in Teams V2
Fix for away status detection (idle tracking)
Electron version downgraded to 29.3.0 due to inconsistent behaviour in different desktop environments
Electron version upgraded to 30.0.1
Updated implementation of Notification.requestPermission()
Revert "Build universal app for Mac" - the unsigned package does not run on Apple Silicon. See KNOWN_ISSUES.md for steps how to build the app for Apple Silicon locally.
Add isCustomBackgroundEnabled config option that defaults to true
Enable useMutationTitleLogic by default
Build universal app for Mac, to support Apple Silicon as well as Intel Macs
Electron version upgraded to 30.0.0
Clicking on notification shows the application
Rearranged quit menu
Added menu option to choose notification urgency
Now lets user choose the notification method and urgency
Support for electron CLI flags in config file
Additional logs for debugging custom background issues
Electron version upgraded to 29.3.0
Fix: Teams doesn't remember the setting disable notification sound
Electron version upgraded to 29.2.0
Now the notification badge count clears when all are read
updating tray icon with the number in the document.title. This is hidden behind a feature flag/config option called useMutationTitleLogic
moved trayIconRenderer out of the activityHub, and to react to events instead.
re-order config readme to show in the right order.
removing the 'removal' of the opt in for teamsv2. Now if you use that feature flag and want to revert you will need to do it manually.
adding how to debug in bug report, moving react logic into its own ha… by @IsmaelMartinez in #1176
Feature/teams v2 changes theme by @IsmaelMartinez in #1177
feat: add opt in handling for teams v2 by @mhenselin in #1160
Removing the angular recurring call to disable some promotions as I s… by @IsmaelMartinez in #1152
Hotfix/remove recurring angular call by @IsmaelMartinez in #1153
Hotfix/remove recurring angular call by @IsmaelMartinez in #1154
add support for changing idle (away) state in Teams2 by @bastidest in #1157
Added bail out logic to the angular detection as this is creating some memory issues in some users
New: Electron version upgraded to 29.1.1
New: Electron version upgraded to 29.0.1
Fix: Preload script error introduced in 1.4.11
Fix: MacOS - Disable Option + Left / Right keyboard shortcuts for history navigation (it is used for word jumping on MacOS)
New: Experimental switch --awayOnSystemIdle which sets the user status to away when system goes idle
New: Electron version upgraded to 28.2.1
New: Updated snap core to core22
New: Added --followSystemTheme config option
Fix: Notifications show the app's icon and not the sender's profile picture
New: Added the notification options to the tray menu
Fix: Wayland screenshare including system audio
Documentation: Added Flatpak config file location
New: Added apptitle to the tooltip
New: Rework wayland screenshare source selection
Fix: Getting version from cli arg with yargs after the Electron 28 bump
New: Electron version upgraded to 28.0.0
Fix: Updated ipc handlers for incomming call command
Electron version upgrade to 28.0.0
Update dependencies to latest versions
New: Make sure executable is writable before running fuses in afterpack script
Fix: Missing "Meeting started" notifications
New: Allow usage of arbitrary disable-features switch
New: Adds afterpack script to flip EnableCookieEncryption electron fuse
New: Increased node version in the runners
New: Enhanced zooming in and out controls
New: Added support for running custom scripts on events
Fix: custom css compatibility with New Teams
New: Moved about menu entry to bottom
Update: Upgraded electron version to 27.0.3
Update: Edited documentation
Updated documentation
Fix: Avoid calling child_process.exec with untrusted string
New: add flag --disableGpu to disable GPU and hardware acceleration
Update: Electron version upgraded to 27.0.2
Update: Electron version upgraded to 24.8.5
Fix: Import empty certificate path. The default config.clientCertPath is an empty string
Fix: A glitch in network waiting loop
Fix: fixed HTTPS network check from behind an HTTP proxy
New: Added --onlineCheckMethod {https,dns,native,none} to enable picking a different network check method (or disabling)
Update: reordering and cleaning up the list of config options
New: Added about dialog
New: Network check logic uses HTTP instead of DNS resolve
New: App now waits for network during start up. It waits for up to 30 seconds before becomes idle.
Default value for --onlineOfflineReload flag is set to false
New: More plugs added to snap package
New: Electron version downgraded to 24.6.3 due to multiple issues
New: Electron version upgraded to 25.4.0
Fix: White screen after wakeup from suspend mode
New: Electron version upgraded to 25.3.2
New: Workaround solution for screen sharing issues in Wayland
New: --bypassWaylandSourceSelection flag for those desktop environments that do not require additional video source selection dialog during screen-sharing request under Wayland
New: Spellchecker language selections are persisted between runs
Electron version upgraded to 24.6.3
New: Support for monochrome icon
New: Empty spellchecker language list disables spellchcker
New: Command-line argument --defaultURLHandler to change the browser application to be used to open links instead of the system default
Electron version downgraded to 24.6.2
Electron version upgraded to 25.2.0
New: Command line flag --disableAutogain
Fix: Tray icon missing when --menubar hidden parameter is used
New: Command-line parameter --menubar [auto | visible |hidden]
Fix: A rare crash when session times out
New: Added flag --disableNotificationWindowFlash which disables flashing the window frame when there is a new notification
New: Additional logs to debug notification issues
Restored appdata.xml
New: Badge count on supported desktop environments
Update: default value for disableNotificationSoundIfNotAvailable is set to false
Fix: External links are not opened correctly when they point to a Teams channel
New: Code refactoring
New: Now custom background images can be downloaded from a remote server
New: Command line parameter --customBGServiceIgnoreMSDefaults to ignore Microsoft provided images
New: Custom background service 'config.json' need not have prefix '/teams-for-linux/custom-bg/' for 'src' and 'thumb_src'
New: User can set custom backgrounds for video calls. Read the documentation in git repo
New: CTRL + Click for SSO login.
New: Settings menu entry with 'Save' and 'Restore'. Settings saved and restored are theme, chat density, devices.
New: Extended quit menu with 'Normally' and 'Clear Storage'. 'Normally' would be the default but 'Clear Storage' would give a fresh start on next launch.
New: Removed menu bar from the popup windows
New: Default chrome user agent set dynamically based on electron version
New: Safely open links
Update: Removed obsolete flag --enableDesktopNotificationsHack
Fix: Mac keyboard shortcuts are shown
New: Back/Forward navigation using keys
Fix: Now zoom in/out shortcuts work while on chat window
Fix: Right click link -> copy not working
Fix: Teams gets unloaded after suspend
New: Improved selection of spell check languages
New: Disable all notifications with --disableNotifications flag
New: Disable/Enable Notification Sound if not Available with --disableNotificationSoundIfNotAvailable flag
Fix: Teams gets unloaded after suspend
Minor code optimization
Updated documentation
New: Option to choose spellcheck language while writing
New: command line option --appActiveCheckInterval
Update: Application presence state optimisation
New: Command line option --screenLockInhibitionMethod to choose screen lock inhibition method. Possible values are Electron and WakeLockSentinel
Fix: away after a couple minutes
Added required permisions for inhibiting screen lock
Fix: Prevent screensaver while in call
Fix: Click on link to external meetings is ignored
Fix: No longer able to open meeting invitations in app
Fix: Option for SSO Login Popups for certain Apps
Fix: The new-window event is deprecated and will be removed. Please use contents.setWindowOpenHandler() instead
New: Set default spellchecker language to en-US
New: Disable hardware media key handling
New command line option --disableNotificationSound
Add doc for additional settings (#703)
New command line argument --appTitle for custom page title
Release to fix dependabot removing the "integration" section from the yarn.lock files
Bringing the multi account option to those who asked for it
Add: Option to load client certificates for corporate auth
Add: Corporate account authentication with smart-card
Add: Option to set the spellchecker languages
Add: WIP Mac OS support
Add: Minimal support for dark mode
Fix: Minimise on startup
Fix: Cannot find how to turn off notifications for started meetings (620)
Fix: Showing expired notifications
Fix: Prevent screensaver while in a call (613)
Fix: No meeting notifications in KDE (470)
Fix: The interstitial page of "Open Teams in Browser" / "Download Linux Client" / "Open in Teams App" opens when the app is started. By @breunigs
New: A command line flag (--clearStorage) to start afresh
Update: Electron version upgraded to 21.0.1
Fixed: Option closeAppOnCross not working (#602)
Update: Electron version upgraded to 20.2.0
Fixed: Right click in text box does not work (#594)
New: Spellcheck is back
Update: Electron version upgraded to 20.1.4

New: Command line argument --appLogLevels for controlling application logs. This can have values error, warn, info, debug. It can be single or multiple levels separated by comma. Default is error. Ex: --appLogLevels=error,warn
Fixed: No notification sound when installed through flatpak (569)
New: More flexible command line arguments
Fixed: No more notification sound (565)
Fixed: Add "zoom-in/out" functionnality (560)
Fixed: Impossible to submit company login (538)
Fixed: Open window when clicking on your launcher (556)
Electron version upgraded to 20.1.1
Fixed: Leaks X11 client connections, eventually causing screen sharing failure
Electron version upgraded to 20.0.2
Fixed: Kill signal does not terminate the app
Fixed: Cannot start teams-for-linux again after quit
Bumped electron version to 20.0.1
Bumped electron version to 20.0.0
Spellchecker is no longer available due to incompatibilities with the latest node versions
Fix: #519 Black window on wayland

description.p: Fixes available in this build:

ul.li: Fix: #455 Screen share: black screen + mouse vs Ubuntu 21.04 + Chrome. Thanks to @pablorq, @herbiejhopkins and @IsmaelMartinez
Fix: #505 Cannot share screen nor window with snap. Thanks to @crazyscientist and @jijojosephk.

description.p: Fixes available in this build:
Thanks @DiegoChajtur for reporting #447

ul.li: #447: Zoom resets to 100% on app close or refresh

description.p: Fixes available in this build:
Thanks @FPSUsername for reporting #488

ul.li: #488: Javascript error in main process

description.p: Latest release is out!
Thanks to all who contributed to this project.

ul.li: Fix: #497 Flatpak install - Not launching from menu entry

description.p: Screen sharing now works.
Thanks to all who contributed to this project.

ul.li: Fix: #492 Can't share screen on Ubuntu

description.p: This release has been focused on fixing flatpak runtime issues.
Thanks to all who contributed to this project.

ul.li: Fix: #489 - Application fails to launch
Known issue: Screen sharing does not work

description.p: This release has been focused on fixing flatpak runtime issues.
Thanks to all who contributed to this project.
This release has been focused on fixing small issues and improving screen sharing capabilities.
Thanks to all who contributed to this project.

ul.li: Major bump from version 1.0.0 to 1.0.13
Migrated to Electron v15

description.p:
While we wait for Microsoft... Here we go, we are now version 1.0.0 🍾🎉
This release has been focus on fixing small issues, improving config options (specially for proxy), adding some bots to help automation, adding more functionality to the right click button and automatically place your downloads into the download folder (opt in feature)

Thanks to @standagh, @emanuelbatista, @jef79m and everybody that created issues/enhancements, fixed and/or tested them.
Special thanks to @julian-alarcon for continuously supporting the snap version of this project and to anyone else that is supporting other package types.
Thanks also to @byteSamurai for introducing hacktoverfest. I manage to get a t-shirt and to get a few people on my team to also contribute.
Its been a long ride, and looks like Microsoft has heard us out loud, but until they got something working as stable as this, I will continue contributing.
Release notes partly done by Stamp.

ul.li: Adding electron dl to automatically place your dowloads into the dowload folder (opt-in feature, check the config options) (#295)
Enabling the right click on url and adding copy URL to that menu option (#294)
Add proxy server to config options to ease configuration (#292)
Adding the 'try-supported-channel-layouts' to avoid locking the audio on the 1st instance (#291)
Feature/fix anylint issues and close #272 (#288)
Bump eslint-utils from 1.3.1 to 1.4.2 (#287)
fix: enable meetups join also for https protocol links (#283)
Updating stale.yml
feat: add join meeting via link outside application (#255)
Feat adding snyk (#260)
Replacing depShield for snyk to check vulnerabilities (#259)
revert - Fix depshield issues (#258)
Fix depshield issues (#256)
Update README.md
Adding stale bot
Fix merge issue (#238)

description.p: Because #217, you need to clear you config folder before your 1st login (config folder locations). This is not necessary if you are moving from version 0.6.6 or higher.
This release is been mostly concentrated on bug fixes and making this a bit more stable.
Extras
Apologies if I have missed anyone.

ul.li: Fix #220. Electron's getLocale, and Chromium's l10n_util, can return the language code in the IETF BCP 47 format (en-US) instead of the ISO 15897 format (en_US). Hunspell, the dictionaries included with this project, and the JavaScript code here assumes the ISO 15897 format, so this hotfix converts what getLocale returns. (#234) (97eb15f) Thanks to @pnickerson-cashstar
Add flatpak to configuration directory list (#232) (afbb725) Thanks to @agates
Fix #208. Increasing the electron-builder (#231) (555e364)
Fix #221: updating readme with a link to AppImageLauncher (#226) (4fce0df) Thanks to @orange-buffalo
Fix #171. Can't open Microsoft Teams - blank screen (#218) (f0242d2) Thanks to @inglor and @basaas
Fix #204. Updating default user agent string (#217) (952c55a) Thanks to @whofferbert
Feature #185 Adding the ability to toogle fullscreen f11 (#216) (adeec1d) Thanks to @rt3norio
Update KNOWN_ISSUES to reference cache folder (#171) (#210) (36af526) Thanks to @skyghis
Fix #182. Better handle external requests in new windows (#206) (599e140) Thanks to @HarlemSquirrel

Special thanks also to all the people that reported issues, tested them, fixed them, improved the documentation, and, in general, helped making this a bit more stable. All of this will not be possible with your contributions.

description.p: Using gitflow from now on for releases (having master and develop branches) (Thanks to @julian-alarcon)
#149 Re-implementing the spellchecker to improve performance. (PR #152, #155 and #163)
#123 Is now possible as the main issue was with the spellchecker (issue #149)
#41 Teams-for-linux now also available in Flatpak! (Thanks to @gabops)
#99 Fixing the cursor in snap (PR #168)
#61 Improving the screen-share quality by adding a white end to the browserviews. This is a chrome issue that basically doesn't trigger then the antialiasing. Strange but it works! (PR #165)
#89 Adding the basic part for the xdg-open. This might need a few improvements as it is currently quite difficult to test. (PR #170)
#162 Improving the documentation for snap as people keep coming back reporting camera not working (Thanks @julian-alarcon) (PR in #167)
#171 blank screen issue. Workaround found and documented (Thanks to @sant123 for documenting and the others for finding/testing the solution!) (PR #178)
#176 Fixing the multiple icons in dock (Thanks to @lkms) (PR #179)
#98 Fixing the loop when launching that some people where experiencing.
#109 and #107 Improving the handling of "about:blank" links (mainly connectors and preview images) (Thanks to @HarlemSquirrel) (PRs #131 and #172)
Using gitflow from now on for releases (having master and develop branches) (Thanks to @julian-alarcon)
automating the snap release (Thanks to @julian-alarcon and @benyanke)
Fixing snap and camera not working together (Thanks to @julian-alarcon)
Unpacking the spellchecker dictionaries and adding the ones installed in hunspell (Thanks to @vadimi and @noderat )
Updating the MS icon (Thanks to @julian-alarcon)
removing the apparmor=DENIED messages in syslog for snap build (Thanks to @julian-alarcon)
Adding the --minimized option to start the app minimized (Thanks to @didster)
Adding webDebug to the tray menu options
